✏️ Edit Timetable ADMIN
Edit slot entries per class. Switch between grid view and list editor.
💡 Lab format: CODE B1·Lab ROOM — e.g. DBMS B1·Lab 3
Day Slot Code
📝 Class Note (shown below timetable in viewer)
🔧 Edit Allocation ADMIN
Edit subject–faculty assignments. Changes are live immediately after save.
🤖 Smart Assist
Rule-based intelligence — substitute suggester, attendance alerts, quick search
FIND BEST SUBSTITUTE
Checks attendance, leave patterns, and workload
TYPE A QUERY IN PLAIN ENGLISH
📋 All Class Absent Report
Students with shortage in any subject — grouped by class
🏫 Class Settings
Set classroom number and student strength for each class. Shown in Timetable Viewer and Leave Manager.
⚙️ Admin Settings
Change admin PIN and manage timetable data.
🤖 Smart Assist — AI Configuration
When your PC is ON → uses Ollama (free) via ngrok.
When your PC is OFF → falls back to Anthropic (paid, ~₹0.02/query).
Both are transparent to faculty — they just ask questions.
NGROK URL (your PC, when running)
When ngrok is running: ngrok http 5000 → copy the https URL here
ANTHROPIC API KEY (fallback when PC is off)
Get key: console.anthropic.com → API Keys → $5 credit = ~20,000 queries
🔐 Change Admin PIN
📤 Upload New Excel Timetable
Upload your time_table_2026.xlsx (or newer) to replace all timetable & allocation data at once.
🔍 Fix Missing Subject Data
Some subjects (e.g. Computer Skills, EVS, Lab subjects) are omitted from the portal's main table. This scans subId 1–300 for each affected class and finds the correct IDs.
Takes 2–5 minutes. Run once, then paste the result into app.py.
EXTRA_SUBJECT_IDS — paste into app.py line ~385

🔔 Faculty Class Alerts

              Day-before alert at:
